content: I feel overwhelmed and want to understand what I'm feeling

Feeling overwhelmed can be really challenging. Let’s take a moment to identify what’s contributing to that feeling. Can you name one specific thought or situation that feels most overwhelming right now? This can help us understand and process it better.
I feel anxious right now and need to calm down

It sounds like your anxiety is quite intense. Let’s try a grounding technique called the 5-4-3-2-1 exercise. Identify five things you can see, four things you can touch, three things you can hear, two things you can smell, and one thing you can taste. Take your time with this, focusing on each sense to bring yourself back to the present moment.
I'm stuck in negative thoughts and need help thinking clearly

It’s tough when negative thoughts take over. Let's interrupt that pattern. What’s one specific negative thought you're having right now? Once you identify it, we can work on reframing or challenging it together.
